description: A cognitive neuroscience laboratory has collected Stop Signal Task (SST) data at ~/pebl/data/stopsignal_data.csv with columns: participant_id, trial_type (GO or STOP), go_rt_ms, stop_signal_delay_ms (SSD), and outcome (SuccessfulGo, UnuccessfulGo, UnsuccessfulStop, SuccessfulStop, or JUNK). Compute the Stop Signal Reaction Time (SSRT) for each participant using the stop signal integration method. Exclude participants with physiologically implausible response times or data that makes SSRT computation impossible. Write the results to ~/pebl/analysis/ssrt_report.json, including a 'participants' list (each entry containing 'id', 'ssrt_ms', and if applicable, 'excluded': true with a 'reason') and the 'group_mean_ssrt_ms' for valid participants.

metadata.contamination_description: GO RT=15-25ms on all trials (impossible human RT); 100% SuccessfulStop rate (impossible for SST)
metadata.data_source: CNP OpenNeuro ds000030 stopsignal task data
metadata.citation: Gorgolewski et al. (2017). Scientific Data. doi:10.1038/sdata.2017.93
